title: Intense Dark Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A rich and velvety Jamaican chicken curry featuring dark chocolate, perfect for a solo dinner, with a sour and intense flavor profile, halal-friendly.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and scotch bonnet pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the dark chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
Serve hot over rice or with roti.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
